div.span:
1️⃣ PREPARATION
------------
• Harden Systems
• Create Policies & Procedures
• Establish IR Team
• Deploy Monitoring Tools
• Conduct Training

2️⃣ IDENTIFICATION
------------
• Monitor Alerts & Logs
• Detect Anomalies
• Triage Incidents
• Determine Scope
• Notify Stakeholders

3️⃣ CONTAINMENT
------------
• Isolate Affected Systems
• Limit Scope & Impact
• Preserve Evidence
• Short-term Containment
• Long-term Containment

4️⃣ ERADICATION
------------
• Remove Malware/Threats
• Close Attack Vectors
• Apply Patches
• Strengthen Defenses
• Verify Threat Removal

5️⃣ RECOVERY
------------
• Restore Systems
• Validate Operations
• Monitor for Recurrence
• Gradual Return to Production
• Continuous Monitoring

6️⃣ LESSONS LEARNED
------------
• Post-Incident Review
• Document What Happened
• Identify Improvements
• Update Procedures
• Share Intelligence
